task: Advanced high-economic-value task: Digital PCR Copy-Number Calling With Droplet QC. Context: a launch gate owner needs a numerical decision packet before approving a high-value production or release change for digital pcr copy-number calling with droplet qc in the bioprocess engineering domain. Embedded packet is authoritative and must be the only data source. Calculate all derived fields, classify each record (pass/warn/fail) using the provided scoring rule after unit normalization, rank governing risks, evaluate remediation option combinations subject to the remediation budget, and recommend the smallest sufficient action. Produce an Excel workbook (ddpcr_copy_number.xlsx) and a human-readable decision memo (assay_call.md) containing formulas or executable logic, full intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity analyses (including 5% sensitivity shift check that triggers expert-review when classifications change), and a final decision table. Do not invent inputs or use external data; mark any unresolved ambiguity as needs_review.
